name: Warband at the Gates
description: A full warband marches on the fortress, banners black against the sky.

choices.label: Hold the walls
choices.description: This is what the walls are for.

choices.label: Sally out at dawn
choices.description: Strike first, before they dig in.

choices.label: Negotiate
choices.description: Their captain might take payment over casualties.

name: Harsh Winter
description: Snow buries the roads. Nothing grows; nothing moves.

choices.label: Ration carefully
choices.description: Thin soup, but everyone eats.

choices.label: Burn extra wood
choices.description: Warm halls keep hearts from freezing too.

name: Famine Spreads
description: The whole region starves. Your stores are watched by hungry eyes, inside and out.

choices.label: Guard the granary
choices.description: What's yours stays yours.

choices.label: Share with the starving
choices.description: Mercy will be remembered.

name: The Dragon Passes
description: A shadow crosses the sun. The dragon does not land — this time. Panic spreads anyway.

choices.label: Calm the people
choices.description: It has gone. Stand fast.

choices.label: Offer tribute to the sky
choices.description: The old ways: burn treasure, beg passage.

choices.label: Stand in the open and stare it down
choices.description: Let the people see their commander unafraid.

name: Emissary of the King
description: A royal emissary arrives with an honor guard, assessing your fortress for the crown.

choices.label: Host him lavishly
choices.description: The crown's favor is worth the expense.

choices.label: Receive him plainly
choices.description: Honest walls need no gilding.

choices.label: Win the crown with words
choices.description: Spend wit, not stores, on the king's favor.

name: Siege!
description: They have come for everything. Engines, ladders, a sea of spears — the fortress stands alone.

choices.label: Fight to the last
choices.description: Stone and blood and stubbornness.

choices.label: Hold the inner keep
choices.description: Give them the yard; keep the heart.

name: Deserters Return
description: Those who left in darker days stand at the gate, heads bowed.

choices.label: Forgive them
choices.description: The fortress needs hands more than grudges.

choices.label: Turn them away
choices.description: They chose. Let them live with it.

name: Night of Omens
description: Strange lights over the mountains. The old folk mutter of endings — or beginnings.

choices.label: Declare it a good omen
choices.description: Hope is a weapon. Use it.

choices.label: Say nothing
choices.description: Let people believe what they will.

name: The Last Push
description: Survival is close enough to taste. The people are exhausted, but the end is in sight.

choices.label: Rally them
choices.description: A few more days. Just a few more days.

choices.label: Open the reserve stores
choices.description: Full bellies for the final stretch.

name: Plague Returns
description: The fever is back, and it is angrier this time.

choices.label: Strict quarantine
choices.description: Lock the sick away. No exceptions.

choices.label: Healers work day and night
choices.description: If any healers remain, now is their hour.

name: Cache of the Old Lords
description: Behind a false wall in the keep: weapons and coin from the fortress's first masters.

choices.label: Arm the guards
choices.description: Old steel is still steel.

choices.label: Sell the relics
choices.description: Collectors pay well for history.
